original_image_tags: Black-and-white photograph of two dark, rocky or metallic fragments placed on a light-colored surface. The upper fragment is elongated and irregular with a porous, textured surface. The lower fragment is more blocky and angular, with a fractured or chipped face showing a slightly glossy interior. A small, dark, circular object is visible to the left between the two fragments. The photograph appears to be an archival evidence shot.

elements.description: A black and white photograph showing three distinct dark, rock-like objects against a light background. The top object is a long, rough-textured fragment. The bottom object is a larger, blocky fragment with a broken surface. Between them is a small, smooth, oval-shaped object. Stamped text 'CONFIDENTIAL' is visible at the top and bottom of the photo, and a handwritten annotation 'Incl #3' is visible at the bottom left.

judge.reason: The descriptions disagree on the number and shape of objects in the photograph (two fragments vs. three objects) and one side quotes specific stamped and handwritten text not present in the other.
